name: drift
description: A static, mobile-first web app that streams MP3s from a public Google Drive folder organized into sub-folders (each sub-folder becomes an "album"). Dark Spotify-inspired UI. Playlists persist in `localStorage`. Always pulls the latest folder contents on load.

scripts.deploy:staging: npx vercel && npx vercel alias mysanskar-staging.vercel.app
scripts.ship: git push origin staging && git checkout main && git merge staging --ff-only && git push origin main && git checkout staging && npx vercel --prod && npm run build:ios && npm run build:android
scripts.build:ios: bash scripts/build-www.sh && npx cap sync ios
scripts.build:android: bash scripts/build-www.sh && npx cap sync android
